headline: Amgen Oncology Advances Test Dividend Strength And Long Term Growth Story
summary: Amgen reported progress across its KRAS inhibitor portfolio, including Lumakras and next generation candidates such as AMG 410. The company completed a Phase 3 study for Opdivo biosimilar ABP 206, a potential entrant in lower cost immunotherapy markets. These oncology updates arrive as investors weigh pipeline developments alongside the share price, which last closed at $376.97. For investors watching NasdaqGS:AMGN, this oncology update adds more detail to the story beyond headline views on...

summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: Futures are trading lower as many across Wall Street breathed a semi-sigh of relief yesterday after oil futures, which shot up to $120 overnight, retreated below $100 on Monday. headline: Assessing Whether Amgen (AMGN) Shares Look Mispriced After Recent Mixed Returns
summary: Why Amgen (AMGN) is on investors’ radar today Amgen (AMGN) is back in focus after recent share price moves, with the stock now around $376.97. With returns mixed over the past week and month, investors are reassessing what the current valuation implies. See our latest analysis for Amgen. While the 1 day share price return of 2.01% stands out against softer 7 day and 30 day share price returns, the 90 day share price return of 20.11% and 1 year total shareholder return of 18.77% suggest...

headline: Gilead Gets a Buy, Amgen a Hold and ORIC a Vote of Confidence: Wall Street’s Latest Biopharma Calls Explained
summary: Wall Street is drawing fresh lines across the large-cap biopharma landscape. Jefferies initiated coverage on Gilead Sciences Inc. (NASDAQ:GILD) with a Buy rating and a $180 price target, while assigning a Hold and a $350 price target to Amgen Inc. (NASDAQ:AMGN). Meanwhile, JPMorgan maintained its Overweight rating on clinical-stage oncology company Oric Pharmaceuticals Inc. (NASDAQ:ORIC) ...
